ela-the-puppet.title: Ela the Puppet
ela-the-puppet.subtitle: Stop-Motion
text: Let me introduce you to Little Ela, my very first puppet, inspired by me. Everything began with this puppet, and my love for stop motion continues to grow every day. I'm excited to share this journey with you as I explore creativity and bring stories to life, one frame at time!

mini-vahid.title: Mini Vahid
mini-vahid.subtitle: Stop-Motion
text: This little guy was inspired by my love of my life and was a special birthday gift for him. He has always been a huge fan of my work, encouraging me to follow my dreams. I'm thrilled to share that he was over the moon to receive such a gift! If you’re interested, don’t hesitate to order yours—I’m open for commissions!
